function.name: addGroceryItem
function.description: Add an item to the family's grocery list

item.description: The name of the grocery item to add

quantity.description: Optional quantity or amount (e.g., '2 lbs', '1 gallon')

function.name: removeGroceryItem
function.description: Remove an item from the family's grocery list

item.description: The name of the grocery item to remove

function.name: getGroceryList
function.description: Read back all pending items on the family's grocery list

function.name: addCalendarEvent
function.description: Add an event or appointment to the family calendar

date.description: The date of the event in YYYY-MM-DD format

function.name: getCalendarEvents
function.description: Get calendar events for a specific date. If no date is given, returns today's events.

date.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

function.name: addTask
function.description: Add a task to the family task list

assignedTo.description: Optional name of the family member to assign the task to

dueDate.description: Optional due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

function.name: completeTask
function.description: Mark a task as completed by its title or partial match

title.description: The task title or a partial match to find and complete

function.name: getTasks
function.description: Get all pending (incomplete) tasks for the family

function.name: getFamilyInfo
function.description: Get information about the family members
